zh.Blore, Staffordshire, England: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布洛爾
zh.Sturton, Lincolnshire, England: 英國林可爾史爾斯圖爾頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Basset於1406年6月10日出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾布洛爾時，他的父親Ralph Basset39歲，母親Margaret Maud Dethick22歲。他於大約1426年與Alice Moton在英國斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1472年12月7日在他的家鄉享年66歲。

zh-hans.Blore, Staffordshire, England: 英国英格兰斯塔福爾布洛爾
zh-hans.Sturton, Lincolnshire, England: 英国林可爾史爾斯圖爾頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Basset于1406年6月10日出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾布洛爾时，他的父亲Ralph Basset39岁，母亲Margaret Maud Dethick22岁。他于大约1426年与Alice Moton在英国斯塔福爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1472年12月7日在他的家乡享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Basset
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: from a diminutive of Old French bas(se) ‘short, of low stature’ (see Bas ).
English: variant of   Bassett  , a cognate of 1 above.
In some cases also an altered form of French Besset (see Bessette 2). Compare Bassette 1.

variants.name: Bas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mauricio, Abelardo, Florencio, Francisco, Jorge, Luis, Manuel, Pedro, Soledad, Vicente.  Eastern Slavic Dmytro, Liya, Pyotr, Sergey.
Catalan: habitational name from a place so named in the district of La Garrotxa, Catalonia.
Basque: topographic name for someone who lived by a wood, from baso ‘wood, forest’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Basset was born on 10 June 1406, in Blore, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ralph Basset, was 39 and his mother, Margaret Maud Dethick, was 22. He married Alice Moton about 1426, in Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 7 December 1472, in his hometown, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Basset est né le 10 juin 1406, à Blore, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph Basset, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Margaret Maud Dethick, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Alice Moton environ 1426, à Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 7 décembre 1472, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Basset am 10. Juni 1406 in Blore, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph Basset 39 und seine Mutter Margaret Maud Dethick 22. Er hat um 1426 in Staffordshire, England Alice Moton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 7. Dezember 1472 im Alter von 66 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Basset è nato il il 10 giugno 1406 nel Blore, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Ralph Basset, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Maud Dethick, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Alice Moton circa 1426, nel Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 7 dicembre 1472, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Bassetが1406年6月10日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアブロアで生まれた時，父Ralph Bassetは39歳，母Margaret Maud Dethickは22歳であった。約1426年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアでAlice Motonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1472年12月7日に故郷で66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Basset(이)가 1406년 6월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 블로어에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Basset(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Maud Dethick(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1426년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 Alice Moton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1472년 12월 7일 그의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.10 June 1406–7 December 1472: 10 de junho de 1406–7 de dezembro de 1472
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Basset nasceu em 10 de junho de 1406, em Blore, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ralph Basset, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Maud Dethick, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Moton aproximadamente 1426, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 7 de dezembro de 1472, em sua cidade natal, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Basset родился 10 июня 1406 г. в местности блор, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ralph Basset было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Maud Dethick, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Moton около 1426 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 7 декабря 1472 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 66 лет.

es.10 June 1406–7 December 1472: 10 de junio de 1406–7 de diciembre de 1472
es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Basset nació el 10 de junio de 1406, en Blore, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Ralph Basset, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Margaret Maud Dethick, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Alice Moton aproximadamente 1426, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 7 de diciembre de 1472, en su pueblo, a la edad de 66 años.
